name: Yololiv YoloBox ULTRA + Adapter Charger Live Stream Portable Studio
description: YoloBox ULTRA dari YoloLiv merupakan monitor 8-Inch Touch Screen dan panel kontrol dengan berbagai jenis tangkapan stream hingga 4K. YoloBox bekerja sebagai monitor multi produksi, hingga 4 sumber video switching.

features.Key Features: Simultaneous Cross-Platform Streaming | Encoder, Monitor, Switcher & Recorder | Horizontal & Vertical Orientations | 8" Touchscreen Control LCD | Live Switch Between 10+ Sources | 4 x HDMI,1 x USB-C & 2 x USB-A Inputs | Supports H.265 up to UHD 4K Video | Stream via Ethernet, Wi-Fi 6, 4G Network | 1 x SD Card Slot for Recording | 650 cd/m² Brightness, Built-In Battery
features.What's In the Box: YoloLiv YoloBox Ultra Portable Multicamera Encoder/Streamer, Switcher/Monitor & Recorder | 2 x USB-C Charging Cable | Cold Shoe Mount | SIM Card Eject Pin | Adapter Charger
